---
title: Groups
---

A [duplicate invalid link](/unknown-duplicate/) and another [duplicate invalid link](/unknown-duplicate/) on the same line.

A [triple invalid link](/unknown-triple/) with another [triple invalid link](/unknown-triple/) and yet another [triple invalid link](/unknown-triple/) on the same line.

A [different invalid link A](/unknown-a/) and [different invalid link B](/unknown-b/) on the same line.

A [duplicate invalid hash](/guides/example/#unknown-duplicate-hash) and another [duplicate invalid hash](/guides/example/#unknown-duplicate-hash) on the same line.
